title: calpidia cauliflora
intro: Calpidia cauliflora, also known as the "Milkweed Butterfly Bush", is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Calpidia cauliflora include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies.
